UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEERNANDEZ, RICARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORAGFO, JOHNNY AKA BORREGO, JOHNNY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 59 ALVARADO ST. S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BUTLER, BARBARA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, CALENDAR OF DEC-20-1993, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER

#5 D. WICK, JUDGE; B. FIELDS, CSR; G. ESPINOCILLA, CLERK. 9:25 AM CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF IS PRESENT WITH COUNSEL JANET KLEINBERG. DEFT BARBARA BUTLER IS NOT PRESENT & IN PRO PER. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE ARE PRESENTED AND ADMITTED. PLTF RESTS. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF FOR THE RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 59 ALVARADO S.F, FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT, RENT & DAMAGES OF $410.67 AND COSTS OF $170.00. EXHIBITS ARE WITHDRAWN. PLTF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT. COURT ADJOURNS.
